source_pr.title: *: fix some lints produced by golangci-lint
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
When running `golangci-lint`, it will produce a lots of warnings.

### What is changed and how it works?
This PR fixes some of these warnings. It still has a lot of code which is not used by current TiDB or the error of the code is not handled correctly. Maybe those can be included in another PR to fix. 

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select b from (SELECT * FROM t UNION ALL SELECT a, b FROM t order by a) t") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select b from (SELECT * FROM t UNION ALL SELECT a, b FROM t order by a) t") (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select b from (SELECT * FROM t UNION ALL SELECT a, b FROM t order by a) t") (executor/executor_test.go)
